---
title: "PCR"
author: "Graham I. Gordon"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(boot)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(pls)
```


```{r}
clickstream <- clickstream %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

colnames(clickstream)
```

```{r}
train <- sample( 1:nrow(clickstream), size = .7*nrow(clickstream) )
train_df <- clickstream[train, ]
test_df <- clickstream[-train, ]
table(clickstream$price_2)
```

```{r}
library(MASS)  # for fitdistr
library(dplyr)

# Example: your clickstream data
# Each row is a click event; we want the MAX order per session (total clicks)
session_lengths <- clickstream %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(total_clicks = max(order))

# Look at the distribution
hist(session_lengths$total_clicks, 
     breaks = 30,
     main = "Distribution of Session Lengths",
     xlab = "Total Clicks per Session")
```



```{r}
# Fit Negative Binomial to session lengths
fit <- fitdistr(session_lengths$total_clicks, "negative binomial")

# Extract parameters
r  <- fit$estimate["size"]   # dispersion/shape
mu <- fit$estimate["mu"]     # mean session length

cat("r (size):", r, "\n")
cat("mu (mean):", mu, "\n")
```



```{r}
predict_total_clicks <- function(k, r, mu) {
  p <- r / (r + mu)          # NB success probability

  # Correct posterior: after k clicks, expected remaining
  # E[Total | X >= k] under NB is derived from the memoryless-ish
  # property — but NB is NOT memoryless, so remaining clicks decrease
  
  # Posterior expected total given at least k clicks already observed:
  # E[N | N >= k] = k + (1-p)/p * ... requires truncated NB
  
  # Simplest defensible approach: use the truncated NB mean
  expected_total <- k + (mu - k) * (1 - p)^k / sum(dnbinom(k:1000, size=r, mu=mu))
  
  return(list(
    observed       = k,
    expected_total = round(max(k, expected_total), 1),
    expected_more  = round(max(0, expected_total - k), 1)
  ))
}

# Example: session currently at click 5
predict_total_clicks(k = 5, r = r, mu = mu)

# Example: session currently at click 15
predict_total_clicks(k = 15, r = r, mu = mu)
```

```{r}
# For every session, predict total given clicks so far
live_predictions <- clickstream %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(current_clicks = max(order)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_total = predict_total_clicks(current_clicks, r, mu)$expected_total,
    predicted_more  = predict_total_clicks(current_clicks, r, mu)$expected_more
  )

head(live_predictions)
```


```{r}
# Overlay NBD fit on histogram
x <- 0:max(session_lengths$total_clicks)
nbd_probs <- dnbinom(x, size = r, mu = mu)
```

```{r}
hist(session_lengths$total_clicks,
     breaks = "Sturges",   # let R decide
     freq = FALSE,
     main = "NBD Fit to Session Lengths",
     xlab = "Total Clicks")
```


```{r}
# Diagnose before plotting
cat("Max clicks:", max(session_lengths$total_clicks), "\n")
cat("Num sessions:", nrow(session_lengths), "\n")
cat("Length of x vector:", max(session_lengths$total_clicks) + 1, "\n")
```

```{r}
# Build evaluation dataset: for each session, at each click point,
# predict total and compare to actual final click count

actual_totals <- clickstream %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(actual_total = max(order))

# Generate predictions at every observed click point
eval_df <- clickstream %>%
  dplyr::select(sid, order) %>%
  rename(k = order) %>%
  left_join(actual_totals, by = "sid") %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_total = predict_total_clicks(k, r, mu)$expected_total,
    error           = predicted_total - actual_total,
    abs_error       = abs(error)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Overall MAE and RMSE
eval_df %>%
  summarise(
    MAE  = mean(abs_error),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean(error^2)),
    bias = mean(error)       # positive = over-predicting
  )
```
```{r}
# Calibration check: are predicted totals unbiased?
eval_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = predicted_total, y = actual_total)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Predicted vs Actual Session Length",
       x = "Predicted Total Clicks",
       y = "Actual Total Clicks")
```

```{r}
# Compare fitted mu to actual data
cat("Fitted mu:", mu, "\n")
cat("Actual mean session length:", mean(actual_totals$actual_total), "\n")
cat("Actual median:", median(actual_totals$actual_total), "\n")
cat("Actual max:", max(actual_totals$actual_total), "\n")

cat("Max session length in data:", max(actual_totals$actual_total), "\n")
```
```{r}
# Is error driven by a few long sessions?
eval_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = actual_total, y = error)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth() +
  labs(title = "Error vs Actual Session Length",
       x = "Actual Total Clicks", y = "Prediction Error")
```
```{r}
eval_df %>%
  filter(actual_total <= 50) %>%
  summarise(
    MAE  = mean(abs_error),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean(error^2)),
    bias = mean(error),
    n    = n()
  )
```
```{r}
actual_totals %>%
  mutate(click_bin = cut(actual_total, 
                         breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, 50, Inf),
                         labels = c("1-5", "6-10", "11-15", "16-20", "21-30", "31-50", "50+"))) %>%
  count(click_bin) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = click_bin, y = prop)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(prop, accuracy = 0.1)), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Session Lengths",
       x = "Total Clicks per Session",
       y = "Proportion of Sessions") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# Cap at 11
x <- 0:11
nbd_probs <- dnbinom(x, size = r, mu = mu)

session_lengths_capped <- session_lengths %>%
  filter(total_clicks <= 11)

hist(session_lengths_capped$total_clicks,
     breaks = 0:12 - 0.5,   # center bars on integers
     freq = FALSE,
     main = "NBD Fit to Session Lengths (≤ 11 Clicks)",
     xlab = "Total Clicks")

lines(x, nbd_probs, col = "red", lwd = 2, type = "b", pch = 16)
legend("topright", legend = "NBD fit", col = "red", lwd = 2)
```


```{r}
actual_totals <- clickstream %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(actual_total = max(order)) %>%
  filter(actual_total <= 10)

eval_df <- clickstream %>%
  dplyr::select(sid, order) %>%
  rename(k = order) %>%
  inner_join(actual_totals, by = "sid") %>%  # inner_join drops sessions > 10
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_total = predict_total_clicks(k, r, mu)$expected_total,
    error           = predicted_total - actual_total,
    abs_error       = abs(error)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

eval_df %>%
  summarise(
    MAE  = mean(abs_error),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean(error^2)),
    bias = mean(error)
  )
```
```{r}
short <- session_lengths %>% filter(total_clicks <= 10)
long  <- session_lengths %>% filter(total_clicks > 10)

fit_short <- fitdistr(short$total_clicks, "negative binomial")
fit_long  <- fitdistr(long$total_clicks,  "negative binomial")

prop_short <- nrow(short) / nrow(session_lengths)
prop_long  <- 1 - prop_short

cat("Proportion short:", prop_short, "\n")
cat("Proportion long:", prop_long, "\n")
```


```{r}
# Fit each component
fit_short <- fitdistr(short$total_clicks, "negative binomial")
fit_long  <- fitdistr(long$total_clicks,  "negative binomial")

r_short  <- fit_short$estimate["size"]
mu_short <- fit_short$estimate["mu"]
r_long   <- fit_long$estimate["size"]
mu_long  <- fit_long$estimate["mu"]

cat("Short - r:", r_short, "| mu:", mu_short, "\n")
cat("Long  - r:", r_long,  "| mu:", mu_long,  "\n")
```


```{r}
predict_mixture <- function(k, r_short, mu_short, r_long, mu_long, 
                             prop_short, prop_long, max_clicks = 5000) {
  
  # P(session is short | we've already seen k clicks)
  # If k > 10, it MUST be a long session
  if (k > 10) {
    p_short_given_k <- 0
    p_long_given_k  <- 1
  } else {
    # P(N >= k | short) * P(short)
    p_k_short <- pnbinom(k - 1, size = r_short, mu = mu_short, 
                          lower.tail = FALSE) * prop_short
    p_k_long  <- pnbinom(k - 1, size = r_long,  mu = mu_long,  
                          lower.tail = FALSE) * prop_long
    
    # Normalize
    p_short_given_k <- p_k_short / (p_k_short + p_k_long)
    p_long_given_k  <- p_k_long  / (p_k_short + p_k_long)
  }
  
  # Expected total from each component given N >= k
  expected_from_component <- function(k, r, mu) {
    ns    <- k:max_clicks
    probs <- dnbinom(ns, size = r, mu = mu)
    if (sum(probs) == 0) return(k)
    probs_cond <- probs / sum(probs)
    sum(ns * probs_cond)
  }
  
  exp_short <- expected_from_component(k, r_short, mu_short)
  exp_long  <- expected_from_component(k, r_long,  mu_long)
  
  # Mixture expectation
  expected_total <- p_short_given_k * exp_short + p_long_given_k * exp_long
  
  return(list(
    observed        = k,
    expected_total  = round(expected_total, 1),
    expected_more   = round(max(0, expected_total - k), 1),
    p_short         = round(p_short_given_k, 3),
    p_long          = round(p_long_given_k, 3)
  ))
}
```


```{r}
# Test it
predict_mixture(k = 2,  r_short, mu_short, r_long, mu_long, prop_short, prop_long)
predict_mixture(k = 5,  r_short, mu_short, r_long, mu_long, prop_short, prop_long)
predict_mixture(k = 11, r_short, mu_short, r_long, mu_long, prop_short, prop_long)
predict_mixture(k = 30, r_short, mu_short, r_long, mu_long, prop_short, prop_long)
```

```{r}
# Rebuild actual_totals without cap
actual_totals <- clickstream %>%
  group_by(sid) %>%
  summarise(actual_total = max(order, na.rm = TRUE))

# Rebuild short/long split
short <- session_lengths %>% filter(total_clicks <= 10)
long  <- session_lengths %>% filter(total_clicks > 10)

prop_short <- nrow(short) / nrow(session_lengths)
prop_long  <- 1 - prop_short

# Rerun eval
eval_df_mix <- clickstream %>%
  dplyr::select(sid, order) %>%
  rename(k = order) %>%
  left_join(actual_totals, by = "sid") %>%
  left_join(k_lookup, by = "k") %>%
  mutate(
    error     = predicted_total - actual_total,
    abs_error = abs(error)
  )

eval_df_mix %>%
  summarise(
    MAE  = mean(abs_error),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean(error^2)),
    bias = mean(error)
  )
```


```{r}
# Empirical proportions
emp <- session_lengths %>%
  count(total_clicks) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))

# Mixture model predicted proportions
mix_probs <- tibble(total_clicks = 1:195) %>%
  mutate(
    prob = prop_short * dnbinom(total_clicks, size = r_short, mu = mu_short) +
           prop_long  * dnbinom(total_clicks, size = r_long,  mu = mu_long)
  )

# Overlay
ggplot() +
  geom_col(data = emp, aes(x = total_clicks, y = prop), 
           fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = mix_probs, aes(x = total_clicks, y = prob), 
            color = "red", lwd = 1) +
  geom_point(data = mix_probs, aes(x = total_clicks, y = prob), 
             color = "red", size = 1) +
  xlim(0, 50) +  # cap x axis for readability
  labs(title = "Mixture NBD Fit vs Empirical Session Lengths",
       x = "Total Clicks per Session",
       y = "Proportion") +
  theme_minimal()
```
